feed.title: Cognitive Semiotics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Cognitive Semiotics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Individuation of idiomatic sense in inner speech: integrating the Egger–Vygotsky hypothesis with embodied semantics and the default mode network
entry.summary: Authors: Francesco Verde DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cogsem-2026-3002 Pages: Page range: 1-27

entry.title: Metaphor is conflational, not conceptual: rectifying the central error of conceptual metaphor theory
entry.summary: Authors: Tim Adamson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cogsem-2026-3001 Pages: Page range: 29-53

entry.title: A fool for rhythm: the iconicity of parallelism
entry.summary: Authors: Randy Allen Harris DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cogsem-2026-3003 Pages: Page range: 55-82
